theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

narrative.summary: Talen Energy: 정량 종합 70점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 61 / 중기 71 / 장기 74. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 5.0% → 2-ATR 손절폭 10.0%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, Value Area High, Anchored VWAP (고점 기준). 현재가 대비 +5.3% 위치. T1 $450.6 (R:R 2.7)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $366.2 아래 손절가 $334.5 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Citadel Securities Loses Court Fight Over New IEX Options Venue
top_news.summary: Citadel Securities lost its bid to block IEX Group Inc. from launching a new type of options exchange that intentionally slows orders, after a federal appeals court on Friday rejected the market maker’s challenge.

top_news.title: Quantinuum Said to Weigh Boosting IPO Size and Price Range
top_news.summary: Honeywell International Inc.-backed quantum computing company Quantinuum Inc. is considering increasing the size of its initial public offering, according to a person familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: NYC’s Mamdani Mimics Trump, Musk DOGE With COGE Plan
top_news.summary: Bloomberg's Nacha Cattan joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’s forming a new Commission of Government Efficiency, or COGE, to improve the way City Hall spends public funds.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: S&P 500 Powers Historic Weekly Run on US-Iran Bets: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks to a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.

top_news.title: 'There's A Lot More To Come' In AI Says Aliaga
top_news.summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss AI trends and how it is changing how we view the markets. She stated that we are still in the beginning stages of the AI boom and we will see some  more volatility as markets get it footing around the technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to Help From US
top_news.summary: Shipowners are increasingly optimistic about a pickup in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz after more vessels left the waterway this week with the US providing information to aid those making the journey.

top_news.title: US Stocks Extend Win Streak on Peace Deal Hopes, AI Excitement
top_news.summary: Stocks climbed on Friday to close at a fresh record, boosted by hopes of a peace deal with Iran and expectations that spending on artificial intelligence will continue propelling corporate earnings growth.

top_news.title: Wall Street Dumps Crash Hedges as Most-Shorted Stocks Jump 30%
top_news.summary: Caution has become the most expensive position on Wall Street.

top_news.title: Ford Stock Has Best Month Since Financial Crisis on AI Rally
top_news.summary: Ford Motor Co. shares recorded their best monthly gain in 17 years as the automaker’s newfound status as a possible beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom sparked an investor frenzy.

top_news.title: Space Rally Gets Reality Check With Blue Origin Blowup
top_news.summary: A weeks-long rally in space-related stocks came to an abrupt halt on Friday, with the explosion of a Blue Origin rocket serving as a glaring reminder of the risks that come with the potential riches investors hope to reap from the blossoming industry.
